message:
fix(robot,serve): remove dead code and fix SSE timeout

- robot/history.go: Remove unreachable else branch in PrintHistory.
  opts.Session is guaranteed non-empty due to early return at line 44.

- serve/server.go: Set WriteTimeout to 0 to support long-lived SSE
  streams at /events endpoint. Previous 15s timeout could prematurely
  close SSE connections during periods of low event activity.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -81,7 +81,7 @@ func (s *Server) Start(ctx context.Context) error {
 		Addr:         fmt.Sprintf("%s:%d", s.host, s.port),
 		Handler:      corsMiddleware(loggingMiddleware(mux)),
 		ReadTimeout:  15 * time.Second,
-		WriteTimeout: 15 * time.Second,
+		WriteTimeout: 0, // Disabled to support long-lived SSE streams at /events
 		IdleTimeout:  60 * time.Second,
 	}
